description: Account in Arabic script, evidently itemizing amounts/items owed between Abū l-[...] and Yūsuf al-Bayyāʿ. May mention calves (ʿujūl, ʿijl). The term طرف appears several times followed by a quantity in raṭls. Merits further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
